description: Record the assessment of `coctostan/pi-hashline-readmap` against the desired local workflow: `fd` when available, grep/search defaults leaning on `ast-grep` and ripgrep, safer editing/replacement, understanding what bash compression actually does, and fit for Obsidian-style PKM/docs/non-code use. Include practical downsides and likely edge-case mismatches for using it as-is for a trial period.
title: Document pi-hashline-readmap fit assessment for local search/edit + PKM workflows
